title: Vinegar King Crimson (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces KC skin1 with its appearance on Vento Aureo Volume 58 (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces KC skin1 with its appearance on Vento Aureo Volume 58

Sorry, King Crimson has kinda boring alternate appearances.
